description: Noisier hints, staged new arrivals, and enough urgent work to force prioritization decisions.

initial_tickets.description: Our annual plan renewed overnight even though I thought auto-renew was off. Please refund it if possible.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: The hint is misleading, but this is a standard billing renewal dispute with enough context to act.

initial_tickets.description: Our whole team is locked out because every 2FA code is being rejected after today’s login policy change.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Access failure for an entire team is a technical incident despite the noisy billing hint.

initial_tickets.description: Where can I download your data processing addendum for our records?
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Documentation request with a wrong hint and no technical troubleshooting required.

initial_tickets.description: Webhook deliveries started returning 500 for every event right after yesterday's release.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Production integration failures are technical and time-sensitive.

initial_tickets.description: My invoice amount looks wrong, but I do not know which subscription changed or when it happened.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Billing owns it, but key information is missing so requesting more detail is the correct action.

initial_tickets.description: We reduced our workspace from 12 seats to 8 last week, but the renewal still charged us for 12.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Seat-count billing mismatch is owned by billing and can be corrected from the ticket.

initial_tickets.description: How do I invite another teammate to the workspace?
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Simple product usage guidance with low urgency.

initial_tickets.description: The mobile app just spins forever on startup after the latest update.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Client-side startup bug belongs to technical support even though the hint is wrong.

tickets.description: Our production API started returning 401 for valid keys right after key rotation. Checkout is failing.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Revenue-impacting authentication outage is critical and needs technical escalation.

tickets.description: My card was charged, but the workspace still shows unpaid and all paid features are locked.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Billing/payment sync issue is blocking account access and should be handled urgently.

tickets.description: Can you explain the difference between the Business and Enterprise plans before we upgrade?
tickets.ground_truth_reason: This is a general product question despite the billing hint.

tickets.description: Reports are very slow for one user in our org, but I do not know if it is browser-specific yet.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Technical ownership is clear, but more diagnostics are needed before the issue can be worked.
